description: Directory-listing probe — proves the model can enumerate tool output.
systemPrompt: You have tools. When the user asks what is inside a directory, always call `list_dir` with dir="." and then list every filename it returns, one per line. Never invent filenames.
userPrompt: List everything in the fixtures sandbox. Include every filename the tool returns.

assertions.message: Scenario requires list_dir to actually be dispatched
Final answer should enumerate all three seeded filenames
